overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night during heavy rain. The player exits a covered commercial promenade with holographic billboards into an open plaza with palm trees and neon-lit umbrellas, then descends into a dark underpass with illuminated vertical pillars. The footage exhibits high-fidelity ray-traced reflections and neon lighting typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: approaching exit of covered walkway into bright open area

agents.ego_description: walking through covered promenade passing large digital billboards and neon pink ceiling lights

entered.detail: large curved digital screen displaying colorful animated advertisements
tall vertical holographic poster featuring a character with sunglasses
dark ceiling structure with embedded pink neon lighting strips
tropical palm trees in planters marking the exit to open area

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered commercial walkway illuminated by pink neon ceiling lights. Large digital billboards line the walls, including a prominent vertical poster on the right. The camera moves forward toward an exit where palm trees are visible against a bright background, with moderate pedestrian traffic moving in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza during heavy rainfall

events.description: exiting sheltered area into heavy rain with visible raindrops and wet ground
transition from artificial neon to natural dark night with ambient city glow

agents.ego_description: walking through rainy plaza surrounded by pedestrians carrying glowing neon umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing purple umbrella walking ahead through the rain
pedestrian with bright red umbrella walking alongside the path

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the plaza
massive modern building with geometric facade and illuminated windows
rain-soaked ground reflecting neon lights and building illumination

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into an open plaza during heavy rain. Palm trees line the left side while a massive futuristic building dominates the right. Pedestrians with glowing neon umbrellas move through the scene, their reflections visible on the wet tiled ground. The lighting shifts from artificial pink neon to the natural dark of night mixed with ambient city glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: interactive light plaza with illuminated floor panels

events.description: approaching large blue illuminated floor panels embedded in the ground
walking over glowing blue grid floor displaying geometric patterns

agents.ego_description: crossing over the blue illuminated floor panels while navigating through scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: child running across the blue illuminated floor panels

entered.detail: large square illuminated floor display with blue LED grid and geometric symbols

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and crosses a distinctive plaza area featuring large blue illuminated floor panels that glow beneath the rain. The panels display geometric patterns and symbols. Palm trees recede into the background on the left while the futuristic building looms closer on the right. A child runs across the glowing floor as the camera continues forward toward an overpass structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath overpass with illuminated pillars

events.description: entering underpass beneath large overpass structure
ambient light drops significantly as moving deeper under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass alongside vertical light pillars, passing groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians with umbrellas gathered near the underpass entrance

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure forming a roof over the walkway
tall rectangular pillars with bright vertical illumination panels
smooth concrete wall with horizontal slats and building windows above

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a semi-covered walkway beneath a massive overpass structure. Vertical light pillars line the left side providing artificial illumination as natural light fades. The right side features a concrete wall with building windows above. The crowd density remains moderate as pedestrians move through this transitional space between the open plaza and the deeper underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep underpass corridor with sequential light panels

events.description: vertical light panels shift from white to greenish hue deeper in corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dark underpass corridor with sparse pedestrian traffic

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a dark, enclosed underpass corridor. The vertical light pillars on the left become the primary light source, casting a greenish-white glow on the wet concrete. The crowd thins out significantly, with only sparse pedestrians visible in the distance. The space feels more confined and tunnel-like as the camera progresses deeper into the underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial promenade into the oppressive shadows of a subterranean underpass. It begins within a covered walkway illuminated by pink neon ceiling lights and digital billboards, moving forward through a crowd toward a bright exit. As the camera emerges into an open plaza during heavy rain, the lighting shifts to a dark city glow where palm trees and futuristic architecture flank pedestrians carrying glowing neon umbrellas. The scene then transitions across a plaza of blue illuminated floor panels featuring geometric patterns before the camera passes beneath a massive overpass structure lined with vertical light pillars. Finally, the environment narrows into a dark, enclosed corridor where the greenish-white glow of the pillars becomes the primary light source against wet concrete as the crowd thins into the distance.
